public_reputation: Fence-running beast spotter who keeps herds off sabotage paths and washed-out routes.
manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a rangers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of rangers in and around Zootia range-lands, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Zootia range-lands workable through the obligations of rangers while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must turn uncertain terrain and changing terms into something people can actually traverse. Around Zootia range-lands, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of rangers visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Joric Fenbow needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Zootia range-lands.
Joric Fenbow can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Joric Fenbow lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Zootia range-lands: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
